description_long: This is a ripe, medium-sized orange fruit with a slightly flattened spherical shape and a dimpled, textured peel. The skin is a vibrant orange color, with subtle variations in hue and small pores visible across the surface. A single green leaf, attached to a short, sturdy stem, adds a touch of natural detail and freshness to the appearance. The fruit's surface shows minor irregularities and natural imperfections, typical of a hand-picked orange. The overall look is juicy and fresh, suggesting it is ready to be eaten or used as a decorative element. The orange would commonly be found in urban settings such as markets, street vendor carts, or as litter on sidewalks and parks.
description: A fresh, dimpled orange fruit with a green leaf and short stem, featuring a vibrant orange peel and natural surface imperfections.
description_view_0: The orange is shown with its green leaf and stem clearly visible, highlighting the textured, dimpled surface and a slightly flattened base.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the rounded back of the orange, with the leaf and stem angled upward and less of the leaf visible.
description_view_2: The orange is seen with the leaf fully extended to the right, showing a smooth, unblemished side and the stem at the top center.
description_view_3: The orange is rotated to display the opposite side of the leaf, with the stem and leaf pointing left and the surface texture clearly visible.
attribute_location_or_placement: street market stall, park bench, sidewalk, kitchen countertop
